title: Nice Clocks
body:
![This mod adds fully functional wall clocks to Minecraft. They come with rotating hands that follow the in-game time of day—just like real clocks! They move at a constant speed, smoothly.   Designs use only vanilla textures, so the clocks blend perfectly into the game without looking out of place. No flashy new art, just simple Minecraft style.  The mod works on its own (requires only Fabric API) and is also compatible with every mod that changes daylight cycle speed.  If you have any suggestions or encouter errors please open an issue on github.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b27d901a6324c957a7305b4597f5fe9c66eabf74.png)


<details>
<summary>Text description</summary>


This mod adds fully functional wall clocks to Minecraft.
They come with rotating hands that follow the in-game time of day—just like real clocks! They move at a constant speed, smoothly. 

Designs use only vanilla textures, so the clocks blend perfectly into the game without looking out of place. No flashy new art, just simple Minecraft style.

The mod works on its own (requires only Fabric API) and is also compatible with every mod that changes daylight cycle speed.

If you have any suggestions or encouter errors please open an issue on github.

</details>
